message:
fix(import): tighten markdown list prefix detection and skip marker-only tokens

List item detection now requires a trailing space after the marker
character (e.g. "- " not just "-"), preventing false positives on
lines that start with a dash but are not list items. Also filters out
marker-only tokens (like bare "-") from split results via
is_marker_only_token.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
